Hi Team,

It was great having you in today’s first training session!

Study Material Folder:  
We have created a folder where study material for every session will be shared.
You can access it here:  https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1vSZKMEHa_bi-TyVrO12KQzqipG3Ng7bz?usp=sharing
As part of continuing your hands-on learning, please complete the following Git assignment.
The goal of this assignment is to help you get familiar with basic Git commands and workflows, which are commonly used in real-world software development.

Assignment : 

Create a New Repository

Create a New File

Create a Branch

Make Changes in the New Branch

Create Another Branch (Optional)

Merge Branches

Create an .env file, add the email to it, add that .env in .gitignore

Pull Changes from Remote

View Git Log and History

Git Status and Staging

Revert and Reset

Submission:
1. Create a document link explaining their approach/steps and add screenshots of all the actions taken
2. In the document also mention the link to your Git repository 

Once the assignment is complete upload the document link via the following Google Form.
Google Form link - https://forms.gle/7cxDQa5LvGgfT3hr6

Also share the path of your Git repository via the below Google Form
https://forms.gle/pEXDeAukofdxWmkp8

Please complete and submit the assignment by March 11, 2026.
If you have any questions while working on this assignment, feel free to reach out.



Regards,
